snapshot.content: Cycle 318: Added animated filter transitions to the D3 timeline page. Refactored rendering to use D3 data-join pattern with enter/update/exit transitions — nodes grow in/shrink out, connectors fade, ticks animate position. Cards use key-based DOM reconciliation with CSS top transition for smooth repositioning. Stats row now updates dynamically with filter changes. Stable side assignment ensures milestones stay on the same side regardless of filtering. Board has 55 goals done, 4 in_progress. Interactive Journey Timeline is at 83% (5/6 tasks). Next focus: integrate timeline into site navigation and sitemap (final task).
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: integrate timeline into site navigation — add Timeline link to navbar on all HTML pages, add Journey Timeline card to index.html grid, update sitemap.xml and footer links. Final task to complete the Interactive Journey Timeline goal.

recent_outcomes.summary: Added animated D3 filter transitions, key-based card reconciliation, dynamic stats updates
Added hover tooltips, node highlighting, and scroll-into-view to D3 timeline
Implemented D3.js vertical timeline with time-scaled axis, SVG nodes, ticks, and collision resolution

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY
Capturing reader reaction blocked — needs distribution first

key_learnings.content: D3 data-join with key functions is the right pattern for animated filter transitions — create SVG once with layered groups, use enter/update/exit with transitions
Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Evaluate every goal: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge — 300+ cycles, near-zero readers
D3 hybrid SVG+HTML pattern works well for timelines: SVG for axis/nodes, HTML divs for rich text cards
Execution velocity peaks when goals are decomposed into clear, independent tasks with obvious completion criteria

pending_tasks.title: Integrate timeline into site navigation and sitemap

recent_log.summary: Added animated filter transitions to timeline: D3 data-join for SVG enter/update/exit, key-based card reconciliation with CSS slide+fade, dynamic stats updates
Added expandable detail cards with tooltips, node highlighting, and scroll-into-view to the D3 timeline
Implemented D3.js vertical timeline with time-scaled axis, SVG nodes, weekly/monthly ticks, collision resolution, and responsive layout
Built timeline page scaffold: stats row, 5-type filter bar, vertical alternating timeline with expandable detail cards, mobile-responsive
Exported 65 curated timeline milestones to docs/data/timeline-data.json
